description: Pinned upstream sources for world's curated datasets. The scheduled upstream-watch workflow compares each pin against its published latest and reports drift. It never updates data: a pin moves through a reviewed change.

methods.regex: Fetch url as text; the first capture group of pattern is the published version.
methods.github-release: Fetch url as JSON; tag_name is the published version.
methods.text: Fetch url as text; the whole trimmed body is the published version.
methods.manual: No machine-checkable version endpoint. Reported for periodic human review at the stated cadence.

sources.name: six-iso-4217-list-one
sources.authority: SIX Financial Information AG, ISO 4217 maintenance agency
sources.content: Current currency, fund and precious-metal codes

sources.name: six-iso-4217-list-three
sources.authority: SIX Financial Information AG, ISO 4217 maintenance agency
sources.content: Historic currency codes and their withdrawal dates

sources.name: cldr
sources.content: Presentation data: numbers, names, lists, date-time, week data, plural rules, person-name patterns, likely subtags, parent locales
sources.cadence: two major releases per year, plus point releases

sources.name: iana-language-subtag-registry
sources.content: Language, script, region, variant and extension subtags
sources.cadence: ad hoc, several times per year

sources.name: iana-tzdata
sources.cadence: ad hoc, several times per year, occasionally urgent

sources.name: gs1-barcode-syntax-dictionary
sources.content: Application Identifier table with per-component formats, linters and cross-AI rules
sources.cadence: GS1's fastest-moving tier; several releases per year

sources.name: unicode-ucd
sources.content: Character database: NFC, Bidi_Class, Joining_Type, Script and related properties

sources.name: unicode-uts-46
sources.content: IDNA compatibility processing and its mapping table

sources.name: iban-registry
sources.content: Per-country IBAN and BBAN structure, bank and branch identifier positions, SEPA flag, examples
sources.notes: swift.com accepts the connection then serves nothing to automated clients; the release number cannot be read without a human fetch.

sources.name: kenya-bank-branch-codes
sources.content: Bank and branch listing: two-digit bank codes, three-digit branch codes

sources.name: ghana-ghipss-sort-codes
sources.authority: GhIPSS, with decomposition per Bank of Ghana Banks' Sort Codes
sources.content: Clearing house sort codes, split bank / clearing zone / branch

sources.name: southafrica-branch-ranges
sources.authority: FNB participating-banks table, a participant publication rather than the allocating authority
sources.content: Six-digit universal branch code ranges per bank
sources.notes: No BankservAfrica, PASA or SARB specification for the code structure was retrievable; the snapshot is documented as participant-sourced.

sources.name: nigeria-cbn-ofi-codes
sources.content: Five-digit other-financial-institution codes used by the NUBAN scheme
